prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年湖南大学在浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约12927名、12519名、12975名、12364名、11784名，整体呈波动前移趋势，近3年累计前移约1191名；2025年基准位次约11784名，为近5年最高水平，反映该校在浙江考生中认可度持续提升；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年132人、2022年134人、2023年134人、2024年138人、2025年140人，呈逐年小幅扩招态势；2026年计划142人，较2025年增加2人，扩招幅度约1.4%，对竞争压力有微弱缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第31名，近年排名稳定在29–32名区间，属于国内顶尖高校梯队，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价中湖南大学未出现明显负面事件，整体平稳；抖音学校热度总排名第16位，评价为"高热"，17条样本视频综合热度约310万，显示该校在短视频平台曝光度高，报考关注度处于高位；历史投档异常记录中未见湖南大学相关信号；第五轮学科评估中湖南大学拥有8个A-及以上学科：化学A、机械工程A、工商管理A、土木工程A-、应用经济学A-、控制科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-，学科覆盖面广，工科与管理学科实力均衡，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续处于"高热推荐"或"推荐"状态，与湖南大学优势学科高度匹配；浙江省2026年高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年约29万人增长约37.6%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+2人）、浙江省考生总数大幅增长（+37.6%）、学校抖音高热及声誉平稳等因素：考生规模激增是最大竞争推动力，扩招的微弱缓解作用不足以抵消竞争加剧，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年11784名基础上继续前移。预测最低位次约11835名，区间11335–12335名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学
- 会计学（含智慧会计、ACCA、财务管理）
- 经济学类（含经济学、财政学、国际经济与贸易）
- 汉语言文学
- 金融学
- 历史学。

二档（中等）
- 计算机科学与技术（含计算机、软件工程，分流任选）
- 计算机科学与技术（智能实验班，含智能科学与技术等）
- 电气工程及其自动化（含电气、自动化、电子信息工程等，分流任选）
- 人工智能（含人工智能、机器人工程、自动化，分流任选）
- 微电子科学与工程
- 电子科学与技术
- 智能制造工程（含智能制造、机械设计制造及其自动化）
- 信息安全（含信息安全、保密技术）
- 集成电路设计与集成系统
- 通信工程
- 新闻传播学类（含新闻学、广告学）
- 工商管理（含组织数智管理、市场营销）
- 行政管理（含行政管理、城市管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 统计学类（含统计学、经济统计学）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 智能车辆工程（含智能车辆工程、车辆工程）
- 工业设计
- 应用物理学
- 量子信息科学
- 化学类（含化学、应用化学、化学生物学）
- 工程力学（力学实验班）
- 大数据管理与应用（含商务大数据、金融大数据）
- 化学工程与工艺
- 生物技术（含生物技术、生物医学工程）
- 精算学
- 环境科学与工程类（含环境科学、环境工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11335–12335名内，建议以二档工科专业（计算机类、电气类、电子信息类）为主攻方向，一档经管文法类专业作为冲刺，三档理学及传统工科专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<11335名）可重点冲刺一档法学、会计学等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>12335名）建议以三档专业为主，谨慎选择生化环材类。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hunan University in Zhejiang Province's comprehensive category were approximately 12,927, 12,519, 12,975, 12,364, and 11,784, showing a fluctuating but overall forward-moving trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 1,191 places in the last three years; the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 11,784 is the highest in the past five years, reflecting the university's continuously rising recognition among Zhejiang examinees; the enrollment plan for Hunan University in Zhejiang's comprehensive category was 132 in 2021, 134 in 2022, 134 in 2023, 138 in 2024, and 140 in 2025, showing a gradual small-scale expansion; the 2026 plan is 142, an increase of 2 from 2025, with an expansion rate of about 1.4%, which has a slight alleviating effect on competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 31st, with recent rankings stable in the 29–32 range, belonging to the top-tier domestic university echelon, which continuously attracts high-scoring examinees; in the 2026 reputation evaluation, Hunan University had no significant negative incidents, remaining generally stable; on Douyin, the university's overall popularity ranking is 16th, rated as 'high heat', with a comprehensive heat of about 3.1 million from 17 sample videos, indicating high exposure on short video platforms and high application attention; no signals related to Hunan University were found in historical abnormal admission records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Hunan University has 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Computer Science and Technology A-, with a wide disciplinary coverage and balanced strength in engineering and management, strongly attracting examinees.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently in a 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' state in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, highly matching Hunan University's advantageous disciplines; the total number of examinees for the 2026 Zhejiang Province college entrance examination is about 400,000, an increase of about 37.6% from approximately 290,000 in 2025, significantly expanding the examinee scale and intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+2), the significant increase in Zhejiang examinee numbers (+37.6%), the university's high Douyin heat and stable reputation, etc.: the surge in examinee numbers is the biggest competitive driving force, and the slight alleviating effect of the expansion is insufficient to offset the intensified competition; it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward from the 2025 ranking of 11,784. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11,835, with a range of 11,335–12,335.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 11,335–12,335, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 engineering majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information) as the main direction, use Tier 1 economics, management, liberal arts, and law majors as a sprint, and Tier 3 science and traditional engineering majors as a safety net. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<11,335), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Law and Accounting; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (>12,335), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors and be cautious with majors in Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials.
